Home.title: Products and pricing foundation for Hostinvo
Home.description: The platform now adds a tenant-aware product catalog on top of authentication, tenancy, and client management: product groups, hosting products, pricing cycles, configurable options, and protected catalog pages in Next.js.
Home.backendDescription: Laravel 11 now exposes tenant-aware `/api/v1/admin/product-groups`, `/products`, and `/products/{id}/pricing` endpoints with policies, validation, configurable options, and billing-cycle pricing.
Home.frontendDescription: Next.js now ships protected product-group and product-management pages, product create and edit forms, and pricing management with English and Arabic labels plus RTL-aware layouts.
Home.servicesDescription: Phase 4 is limited to products and pricing only. Orders, invoices, payments, provisioning, and support remain intentionally unimplemented.
Home.deliverable1: Tenant-scoped product groups, products, pricing rows, and configurable options
Home.deliverable2: CRUD APIs with policies, validation, and billing-cycle support
Home.deliverable3: Protected Next.js product-group and product list pages
Home.deliverable4: Product create and edit workflows with configurable option management
Home.deliverable5: Pricing management pages with English and Arabic labels plus RTL readiness

Auth.loginDescription: Authenticate with your Hostinvo account to access your tenant workspace.
Auth.forgotPasswordDescription: Enter your email address and Hostinvo will send a password reset link.
Auth.resetPasswordDescription: Set a new password for your Hostinvo account.
Auth.resetPasswordPlaceholder: This page is ready for the password reset flow and uses the backend reset endpoint when a token is present.
Auth.forgotPasswordSuccess: If the email exists, a reset link has been sent.
Auth.forgotPasswordError: Unable to send the reset link.
Auth.tokenMissing: The reset token is missing. Open the link from your email to continue.
Auth.dashboardDescription: This placeholder confirms that the tenant-aware auth foundation is working before later modules are added.
Auth.serviceUnavailable: Unable to reach the authentication service.

Dashboard.overviewDescription: Review the current tenant context, assigned roles, and the available client-management and product-catalog entry points before later business modules are added.
Dashboard.clientModuleDescription: Create client records, manage contacts and addresses, and review client activity logs inside the current tenant workspace.
Dashboard.catalogModuleDescription: Organize product groups, manage hosting plans, define configurable options, and maintain billing-cycle pricing inside the current tenant workspace.

Catalog.productGroupsDescription: Manage the catalog structure for this tenant by organizing products into groups with controlled visibility and ordering.
Catalog.productsListDescription: Manage hosting products, configurable options, visibility, and pricing access points inside the current tenant workspace.
Catalog.createProductDescription: Create a new tenant product with product-group assignment, visibility rules, and configurable options.
Catalog.editProductDescription: Update {name} and keep its catalog metadata and configurable options aligned with the current tenant.
Catalog.pricingDescription: Manage the billing-cycle pricing matrix for {name} without touching later billing or ordering modules.
Catalog.groupCreateDescription: Define a reusable grouping structure for the tenant catalog before orders and provisioning are introduced.
Catalog.groupSearchPlaceholder: Search by group name or slug
Catalog.productSearchPlaceholder: Search by product name, slug, or SKU
Catalog.saveError: Unable to save the catalog record.
Catalog.deleteError: Unable to delete the product group.
Catalog.serviceUnavailable: Unable to reach the catalog service.
Catalog.groupsEmptyDescription: Create the first product group in this tenant to organize the catalog for later phases.
Catalog.productsEmptyDescription: Create the first product in this tenant to prepare the catalog for orders and billing in later phases.
Catalog.configurableOptionsDescription: Define the future purchasable choices that will later feed the ordering and provisioning flows.
Catalog.pricingRowDescription: Keep the billing cycle enabled only when the product should be available for that term.

Clients.listDescription: Manage tenant client records, contacts, addresses, and audit activity without leaving the current workspace.
Clients.createDescription: Create a new tenant client profile with the contact and address structure needed for later phases.
Clients.editDescription: Update {name} and keep its contacts, addresses, and status aligned with the current tenant.
Clients.detailsDescription: Complete tenant-scoped client profile including contacts, addresses, and recent activity.
Clients.searchPlaceholder: Search by name, email, or phone
Clients.emptyStateDescription: Create the first client in this tenant to start building the customer directory.
Clients.contactsDescription: Track the people related to this client and mark a primary contact for future workflows.
Clients.addressesDescription: Keep billing, mailing, and service addresses attached to the client record.
Clients.serviceUnavailable: Unable to reach the client service.
